LokalWeb gives small businesses in Kosovo a professional website with online booking — no coding, no hassle.

How It Works

Three simple steps to get your business online

Step 1

Register

Sign up and enter your business details in under 2 minutes.

Step 2

Customize

Choose your colors, upload a logo, add services and business hours.

Step 3

Go Live

Your website is instantly live with online booking built in.

Everything you need to grow

Your Own Website

Get a professional website for your business in minutes, no technical skills needed.

Online Bookings

Let your customers book appointments online, 24/7. No more missed calls.

Mobile Ready

Your website looks great on every device — phones, tablets, and desktops.
